eventLog: Hunt: The goblin strikes back and hits for 10 damage.

Hunt
RESULT
- Action: Attack
- Outcome: Hit
- Damage: 9
- Goblin HP: 19
- Threat: Still active
- Reputation: Menacing Figure

That landed with conviction.

Hunt's brutal strike shakes the battlefield.
Intimidation +1.
Hunt: Your shot strikes the goblin for 9 damage.
Hunt: You draw carefully and prepare to fire.
Hunt attempts: "i shoot an arrow at goblin"

Hunt asks for guidance.
COMMANDS
- look: inspect your surroundings
- attack goblin / shoot goblin: attack in combat
- defend: reduce incoming damage and build honor
- run: try to escape combat
- search: search the area
- rest: recover HP in the bar
- drink: have a drink in the bar
- eat: have a meal in the bar
- barfight: start trouble in the bar
- say hello: speak to nearby players
- threaten: intimidate others in the right setting

Hunt: The goblin strikes back, but misses.

Hunt
RESULT
- Action: Attack
- Outcome: Hit
- Damage: 12
- Goblin HP: 28
- Threat: Still active
- Reputation: Unknown Figure

Clean hit. Not elegant, but effective.

Hunt's brutal strike shakes the battlefield.
Intimidation +1.
Hunt: Your shot strikes the goblin for 12 damage.
Hunt: You shift your footing and aim at the goblin.
Hunt attempts: "shoot "

Hunt
RESULT
- Action: Attack
- Outcome: Miss
- Goblin HP: 40
- Threat: Still active
- Reputation: Unknown Figure

The goblin survives, unfortunately encouraged.
Hunt: Your shot misses as the target jerks out of the way.
Hunt: You steady yourself and line up a ranged attack.
Hunt attempts: "shoot "
The Dungeon Master does not understand Hunt's action yet.
Hunt attempts: ""
Hunt travels to forest.
[EVENT — STREET] A town guard plants a spear in your path and demands to know what you’re up to.
Hunt travels to street.
Hunt travels to village.
[CHAIN EVENT — BAR] The argument explodes. A stool flips, someone swings, and the whole room jolts into chaos.
Hunt escalates the confrontation. The room tips from argument into violence. Rowan will remember this.
[EVENT — BAR] A drunk patron slams his mug down and accuses a traveling merchant of cheating him.
Hunt travels to bar.
The world begins. The village waits in silence.
